narrative: Dollar firms as US Treasury yields hit new highs and crude prices surge — DXY +0.22%; USD/JPY at 162.55 as 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite moderate put skew in 25d RR. Softer Canadian inflation lifts USD/CAD to 1.4057, with the 150bp Fed-BoC spread widening on policy divergence; gold steady +0.00%; equities +0.42%; VIX 17.9. Watch ECB Rate Decision Thursday at 12:15 UTC.
